evidence.label: Edge-vector shifts under pure e1 and e2 gauges
evidence.summary: A pure \(e_1\)-gauge gives \[\delta\nu=(0,2u,2u).\] A pure \(e_2\)-gauge gives \[\delta\nu=(6v,0,6v).\]
